message:
fix: Add missing expression handlers to type inference and mutation analysis

- inferrer.zig: Added set, await_expr, named_expr handlers to
  collectCallsFromExpr for complete expression traversal
- mutation_analyzer.zig: Added comprehensive expression handlers (set,
  if_expr, fstring, listcomp, dictcomp, genexp, lambda, starred,
  await_expr, named_expr) to checkExprForMutation
